name: moodboard-capture
description: Capture full-page website screenshots into a repo moodboard folder or a personal inbox.

interface.shortDescription: Save website screenshots into moodboard folders with sensible defaults.
interface.longDescription: Captures a desktop full-page screenshot for a URL, saves it to the best available moodboard folder, and appends a lightweight JSONL index entry for later browsing.
defaultPrompt: Capture this website into the moodboard folder.
